creator: saken@hotel.rmta.org
text:
1) Update ports/shells/rc to version 1.6 (the first release version
	   in many  years.)
	2) change MAINTAINER line to myself, this is with the approval of
	   erich@FreeBSD.org (the current maintainer)
	3) update the pkg/DESCR to include a WWW line, and reflect current
	   version information.

Fix: Apply the following patch using patch -p1
	
How-To-Repeat: 
	N/A
